verifiedSignals.targetAudit: 射線減衰 森林遮蔽帯/高地稜線 高地射界 高地稜線 / 距離33 / 戦列距離31 / 有効射程34

notes: The profile is activated only by the URL query takawasiTerrainProfile=high-ground.
The profile appends hill/open terrain to the current sector battle scenario and moves initial QA enemy entry closer so the selected hill unit can produce a fireable high-ground LOS candidate.
Normal campaign state and save migration are not changed.
